product.name: EVERBUILD Silicone Sealer
product.description: This generic purpose silicone sealer is a mid-modulus silicone sealant that adheres to most smooth and non-porous materials. It contains an anti-fungal compound in order to restrict the growth of mould in areas that are high in humidity. The sealer creates a permanently flexible rubber seal.Features & Benefits: EVERBUILD Silicone SealerGeneric purpose and mid-modulusAdheres to most smooth and non-porous materialsContains an anti-fungal compound in order to restrict the growth of mould in areas that are high in humidityCreates a permanently flexible rubber seal

product.name: Inta Automatic Bypass Valve
product.description: This Inta automatic bypass valve is a flexible and reliable solution to potential circulation, flow rate, and pump pressure problems in heating systems. The adjustable valve can be calibrated for your system’s optimal flow rates, automatically adjusting itself to maintain constant, steady pressure. Easy to install and adjust, these bypass valves come in either straight or angled variants.Features & Benefits: Inta Automatic Bypass ValveFlexible and reliableA solution to potential circulation, flow rate, and pump pressure problems in heating systemsAdjustable valve can be calibrated for your systems optimal flow ratesAutomatically adjusts to maintain constant pressureInstallation is easyEasy to adjustAvailable in either straight or angled variants

product.name: Inta Male ActivFlo Pro  Power Regulator
product.description: This male ActivFlo Pro power regular provides whole house protection without catalytic turbulence, magnets and semi-precious metals anode and does not require an electrical connection. With a range of sizes available to suit the flow rates of all homes, this ActivFlo is not a filter however it allows the water to pass through and retain all its minerals, making it just as good to drink. Features & Benefits: Inta Male ActivFlo Pro  Power RegulatorRange of sizes to suit a variety of flow ratesWhole house protectionNo catalytic turbulence, magnets or semi-precious metals anodeNo electrical connection requiredWater retains all its minerals

product.name: ESBE Valves VTC311 3/4 Inch Load Valve with Internal Thread
product.description:
This series VTC311 (internal thread) is a compact and accurate load valve used for solid fuel boilers up to 30kW. This load valve makes sure your boiler gets up to a high combustion temperature to ensure the lowest possible emissions.Above all, this valve makes certain that the return temperature to the boiler is kept high and guaranteed over the entire combustion cycle which enables a higher level of boiler efficiency, reduced tarring and increased life span of your boiler.Features & Benefits: ESBE Valves VTC311 3/4 Inch Load Valve with Internal ThreadEasy but normally not required maintenanceStraightforward installationNo need for adjustment valvesAccurate control of the return water temperatureCompactUsed for solid fuel boilers up to 30kWLowest possible emissionsIncreased life span of the boilerReduces tarringHigher level of boiler efficiencyProduct SpecificationESBE Valves

product.name: ESBE Valves Regulators and Controllers
product.description: The Series CRA110 (CRA111 and CRA 115) is a constant flow temperature controller for applications where a constant water temperature is required. Temperature settings are adjusted by an easy-to-use joystick and display interface. The compact controller is designed for operating rotary valves DN15-50 and has an operating range of 90 degrees Celsius.The Series CRA120 (CRA121, CRA125 and CRA122) is a constant flow temperature controller suited for larger systems and valves such as 3F. This is perfect for applications where a constant water temperature is required. product.description:
This ESBE Actuator is crafted to control rotary valves. With a 3-point signal and a 90 degree operating range, mixing valves is made perfectly easy. product.name: ESBE Valves VRG131 Brass Rotary Mixing Valve with Internal Female Thread
product.description:
The VRG130 series of 3-way high performance valves by ESBE are suitable for mixing or diverting operation. Made of high-performing brass, they are suitable for use in heating and cooling installations. The VRG series is available in DN15-50 and has various types of connections, so you'll find valves which are suitable for virtually any pipe dimensions.The valve is combined with ESBE controllers and actuators perfectly. Long lasting and highly durable, these valves also have extremely low internal leakage of less than 0.05%. Their maximum continuous media temperature is 110 degrees Celsius, up to 130 degrees Celsius temporarily. What's more, they are quick and easy to install with the least amount of hassle.Features & Benefits: ESBE Valves VRG131 Brass Rotary Mixing Valve with Internal Female ThreadHigh performance brass rotary mixing valvesInternal female threadExtremely low internal leakageFlexible, compact, quick and easy to installLong lasting and highly durablePerfect match with ESBE actuatorsMaximum media temperature of 110 degrees Celsius continuous and 130 degrees Celsius temporaryAir bubble-tightProduct SpecificationESBE Valves

product.name: ESBE Valves VRI111 Insulation Shell
product.description:
This series VRI111 is part of a range of insulation shells for the valve series VRG and VRB and is available for all sizes DN15 to DN40. This shell is developed according to the directive EnEV2009 and offers a tight seal around the valve to air circulations and heat losses.This shell is designed with a strong self-locking function and there is no need for extra accessories, like tape or springs to keep the two shells together.Features & Benefits: ESBE Valves VRI111 Insulation ShellInsulation shell for the valve series VRG and VRBRange of sizesDeveloped according to the directive EnEV2009Offers a tight seal around the valveStrong self-locking functionNo need for extra accessoriesProduct SpecificationESBE Valves

product.name: ESBE Valves Series 90 3-Point 230V Actuator
product.description:
The Series 90 3-point actuator by ESBE is a lightweight, compact actuator designed for operating DN15-150 rotary mixing valves. It is reversible and comes complete with limit switches that are actuated by adjustable cam discs to obtain an operating range of 30 degree-180 degree. You can operate the actuator manually thanks to a disconnection. In addition, there's an indication on the front indicating valve position. This ESBE 3-point signal control actuator is available for 230V, 50 Hz with running times from 15 to 240 seconds depending on the model.Features & Benefits: ESBE Valves Series 90 3-Point 230V ActuatorCompact 230V, 50 Hz, 3-point actuatorAdjustable operating rangeAssortment for any needAuxiliary switch availableAmbient temperature range of -15 degrees Celsius to +55 degrees CelsiusOperating range of 30 degree to 180 degreeProduct SpecificationESBE Valves

product.name: ESBE Valves VTC512 Range Load Protection Valve (External Thread)
product.description:
This series VTC512 (external thread) is a thermic valve used for solid fuel boilers up to 150kW. This range protection load valve makes certain that your boiler gets up to a high combustion temperature to ensure the lowest possible emissions.Additionally, this valve makes sure that the return temperature to your boiler is kept high and guaranteed over the entire combustion cycle which enables a higher level of boiler efficiency, reduced tarring and increased life span of the boiler.Features & Benefits: ESBE Valves VTC512 Range Load Protection Valve (External Thread)Used for solid fuel boilers up to 150kWLowest possible emissionsAccurate control of the return water temperatureIncreases life span of the boilerNo need for adjustment valveReduces tarringStraightforward installationHigher lever level of boiler efficiencyEasy but normally not required maintenanceThermic valveProduct SpecificationESBE Valves

product.name: ESBE Valves Series 4F Mixing or Diverting Valve PN6 (Flanged)

product.name: ESBE Valves ATA212 Draught Regulator with Immersion Pocket
product.description:
This series ATA200 draught regulator is a reliable and efficient control device for regulating the temperature of solid fuel boilers. The thermostatic control head senses the temperature and, through a lever and chain, adjusts the position of the air vent, thereby regulating the combustion air supply to the boiler. The draught regulator is fully adjustable within the range of 35-95 degrees Celsius. The draught regulator is connected directly to the boiler waterway through a threaded immersion pocket.Features & Benefits: ESBE Valves ATA212 Draught Regulator with Immersion PocketReliable control for solid fuel boilersThermostatic head measures and adjusts the air vent, controlling temperatureEfficiently regulates air supplyFully adjustable, with a temperature range of 35-95 degrees CelsiusProduct SpecificationESBE
ATA212 Draught Regulator with Immersion Pocket 50mm
ATA212 Draught Regulator with Immersion Pocket 75mm

product.name: Loctite Thread Seal 55
product.description: The Loctite 55 Pipe Sealing Cord is a non-curing, high-performance thread sealant designed for quick and reliable sealing of threaded pipe joints in both metal and plastic piping systems. It provides an immediate, full-pressure seal without the need for curing time, making it ideal for applications requiring rapid pressurization.Perfect for sealing threaded joints in plumbing, heating, and gas systems. Ideal for installations requiring immediate pressurization without waiting for sealant curing. Suitable for both residential and industrial piping systems. Supplied in a convenient dispensing container with an integrated cutting tool for precise application.Features & Benefits: Loctite Thread Seal 55Suitable for use on both metal and plastic threaded pipes and fittingsApproved for use with potable water systems (NSF/ANSI Standard 61)Effective in temperatures ranging from -55°C to +149°C
product.variant_name: Loctite Thread Seal 55 - 150m

product.name: Pipelife Pushfit Spigot Elbow
product.description: This spigot elbow from Pipelife is easy to use and install. Careful fitting allows leaks to be avoided and, when kept clear of dirt and debris, the 'rubber ring seal' can form a watertight seal. When de-mounting, the pipe should be cut back to behind the location of the fitting to compensate for potential pipe scoring.Features & Benefits: Pipelife Pushfit Spigot ElbowEasy to use and installCareful fitting allows leaks to be avoidedWhen kept clear of dirt and debris, the 'rubber ring seal' forms a watertight sealSize options available

product.name: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Pressure Sealed System Kit
product.description: This Robokit Intafill pressure vessel and Sealed System Kit from Zimlet is an excellent all-in-one system for retrofitting or part of a new build. Versatile and reliable, these pressure vessels combine a range of practical features as well as modern safety compliance, making them a solid and popular choice amongst installers.Supplied in a range of sizes from 4l all the way to 50l, there's a vessel no matter the size of your project, with flexible options for installation thanks to the supplied wall brackets. Combine this with a range of possible installation orientations, and this vessel is a solid choice no matter how demanding your space requirements are. Within the kit is a filling loop, double check valve, isolating ball assembly, ball and safety relief valve, everything you need to install a sealed system. These Robotkit vessels are also compliant with the Construction Project Regulations as well as G24.1 and G24.2 of the water regulations.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Pressure Sealed System KitComes in a wide range of sizesWall-mounting brackets supplied with lighter vesselsSolid construction and compliance with a range of UK regulationsFlexible installation with multiple ways to mount the systemRange of useful sealed system parts included in the kit
product.variant_name: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Vessel Sealed System Kit - 8l

product.name: Zilmet CAL-PRO Floor Standing Heating Expansion Vessel
product.description: CAL-PRO expansion vessels by Zilmet absorb the water volume variations in closed heating systems. They maintain constant pressure, which helps reduce energy consumption and saves you money. They’re available in a broad range of capacity from 4 litres to 900 litres, making them an ideal solution for various domestic and commercial unvented central heating systems. CAL-PRO vessels work by accommodating the increased water volume during system heating in an unvented circuit. Thanks to the pressurised membrane, water can enter or leave only during periods of heating and cooling.The sturdy vessels consist of crimped or welded carbon steel shells and synthetic SBR (styrene-butadiene) rubber according to DIN 4807-3 norms (‘Expansion Vessels, Elastomer Membranes; Requirements and Testing’), which maximise tank drawdown for all capacities. They’re painted on the outside with red epoxy polyester powder coating which provides an elegant, long-lasting finish. CAL-PRO vessels can operate between -10°C and 90°C and have a maximum working pressure between 1.5 bar and 6 bar depending on their capacity.Features & Benefits: Zilmet CAL-PRO Floor Standing Heating Expansion VesselLong-lasting energy: efficient heating expansion vessels  Available in multiple capacities of  4l to 900 l  Made of carbon steel and SBR rubber  Available in red  Maximum operating temperature -10°C to 90°C Please note: Please note CAL-PRO vessels between 4 litres and 24 litres are sold complete with bracket.
product.variant_name: Zilmet CAL-PRO Floor Standing Heating Expansion Vessel - 250l

product.name: Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane
product.description: This Zimlet horizontal vessel is fantastic for irrigation pumps, centrifugal pumps, submersible pumps, and booster sets. The capacity of a bladder tank is greater than that of other storage tanks, although the same performance can be achieved with a smaller volume, which allows minimum pump starts and retains energy. With a  range of different sizes, you can find the right vessel for your needs.  The bladder is great for alimentary purposes and is fixed at both ends to prevent contact with the inner tank surface. ULTRA-PRO pressure tanks offer fantastic service as the bladder can be replaced with little trouble. The MIG welded carbon steel body has no internal rough spots or sharp edges.When the pump starts, water can enter the membrane tank as system pressure passes the pressure pre-charge with the whole capacity of the tank. Only usable water gets stored. The pressure in the chamber will reach the maximum system pressure and stop the pump, while the tank is filled to maximum capacity. Pressure in the airside will push water into the system when water is required. ULTRA-PRO tanks do not water log and deliver all possible water.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane100% factory tested procedures and certified to PED 97/23/EC24 - 3000 litre capacityReplaceable bladderFor use with potable waterPainted externally with long-lasting epoxy powderMild steel or stainless steel flanges for aggressive water
product.variant_name: DISCON - Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane - 24l

product.name: Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane
product.description: This Zimlet horizontal vessel is fantastic for irrigation pumps, centrifugal pumps, submersible pumps, and booster sets. product.name: Zilmet Floor Standing  Vertical Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane
product.description:
This Zimlet vertical vessel has an interchangeable membrane. The CAL-PRO expansion vessels allow absorption of water volume variations in closed heating systems. They maintain constant pressure, in turn minimising energy consumption. With different options available, these vessels meet various system needs.


Features & Benefits: Zilmet Floor Standing  Vertical Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane4l up to 900l capacityCrimped or welded carbon steel shellsSynthetic SBR rubber (to DIN 4807-3 norms)Maximises tank drawdownVessels are painted with long-lasting epoxy polyester externally

product.name: Zilmet Stainless Steel Dull Finish Vessel
product.description: This stainless steel dull finish vessel is an excellent choice for applications that have high hygienic standards and require an almost limitless product life. The vessel is compact to allow for simple installation in plants that produce sanitary hot water using water heaters or heat exchangers. The combined use of stainless steel and specific membrane material is suitable for use in food processing and temperatures up to 70°C.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Stainless Steel Dull Finish Vessel Stainless steel with a dull finishEquipped with a non-toxic membrane suitable for drinking water (British WRAS/WRc and French ACS regulations)1/2" thread connection0.16-1 litre capacity

product.name: TracPipe CSST Gas Coils
product.description: These TracPipe OmegaFlex Semi-Rigid Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) Gas Pipe Coils are a popular and flexible alternative to traditional fixed copper piping, providing a high degree of versatility and usability without sacrificing quality. These pipes utilise a clever corrugated steel design that bends and flexes easily without deforming, sheathed with several other materials to produce a flexible, reliable, and versatile conduit for natural gas systems.TracPipe sections typically install up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, a compelling argument for installers, and all without the need for soldering, welding, or specialist tools; simply bend the sections by hand. Suitable for external and internal use, these CSST sections can be used underground and overground without the need for additional mechanical or corrosion protection, making for a rugged and reliable system.Features & Benefits: TracPipe CSST Gas CoilsFast and fuss-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredRugged, reliable performance both internally and externallyBSI Kitemarked and class-leading B-S1 Euroclass fire ratingsAvailable in pre-packed kits and bulk coilsIn terms of safety and quality, TracPipe continues to tick boxes, holding BSI Kitemarks as well as class-leading B-S1 EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire ratings. Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, it's clear to see why the TracPipe system is such a firm favourite amongst installers.
product.variant_name: DISCON-TracPipe DN40 CSST Gas Coils - 75m

These pipes utilise a clever corrugated steel design that bends and flexes easily without deforming, sheathed with several other materials to produce a flexible, reliable, and versatile conduit for natural gas systems.TracPipe sections typically install up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, a compelling argument for installers, and all without the need for soldering, welding, or specialist tools; simply bend the sections by hand. Suitable for external and internal use, these CSST sections can be used underground and overground without the need for additional mechanical or corrosion protection, making for a rugged and reliable system.Features & Benefits: TracPipe CSST Gas CoilsFast and fuss-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredRugged, reliable performance both internally and externallyBSI Kitemarked and class-leading B-S1 Euroclass fire ratingsAvailable in pre-packed kits and bulk coilsIn terms of safety and quality, TracPipe continues to tick boxes, holding BSI Kitemarks as well as class-leading B-S1 EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire ratings. Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, it's clear to see why the TracPipe system is such a firm favourite amongst installers.

product.name: TracPipe CSST Gas Coil
product.description: Perfectly suited to new buildings, domestic installations and commercial premises, the Tracpipe CSST gas coil is a corrugated stainless steel pipe with a yellow protective cover. product.name: TracPipe Omegaflex Yellow Silicone Tape
product.description: After you have pressure tested your stainless steel gas pipes, you can use this TracPipe OmegaFlex Yellow Silicone Tape to wrap around the part of the pipe behind the fitting nut that is visible and may be exposed to harsh elements.By using this tape, you can prevent any rusting and corrosion that could potentially cause damage to your pipework, which can save you both time and money when replacing damaged pipes isn’t necessary.Features & Benefits: TracPipe Omegaflex Yellow Silicone TapeSuitable to be used outdoorsEnsures pipe protectionAvailable in different lengths and widths for versatile useFor use with stainless steel gas pipesPrevents rusting and corrosionPlease note: No section of TracPipe® flexible coil or TracPipe® semi-rigid gas pipe cut lengths should be visible.

product.name: TracPipe Omegaflex CSST Installers Kit & Tape
product.description: A popular and flexible gas pipework replacement, this Tracpipe CSST installers kit offers high versatility and usability without compromising quality. It can be used for external and internal applications and contains different lengths of pipe and sealing tape, suitable for use with AutoFlare fittings for comprehensive installations.Without soldering, welding or specialist tools needed, Tracpipe sections can be installed up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, making installation easy with the hand-bending of sections.Features & Benefits: TracPipe Omegaflex CSST Installers Kit & TapeFast and fuss-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredReliable performance both internally and externallyAvailable in different sizes with a range of fittings availableBetter gas flow rates than other products so smaller diameter pipes can be used to save money and keep qualityNot annealed (softened) to maintain strength and resistance to damageTracpipe continues to excel in safety and quality, holding BSI kitemarks and compatibility for use in fire-protected areas. It has an up-to-date and comprehensive Design and Installation Specification, meeting the requirements of domestic and commercial/industrial installation standards for Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG). Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, the Tracpipe system remains a favourite amongst installers.Kit ContentsCut length Tracpipe2m sealing tapeStandards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked to BS 7838 and BS EN 15266Outer cover of TracPipe includes EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire rating of B-s1 d0Please note: Lengths are supplied and cut to size. Due to this, returns on lengths are not accepted.No fittings included.

It can be used for external and internal applications and contains different lengths of pipe and sealing tape, suitable for use with AutoFlare fittings for comprehensive installations.Without soldering, welding or specialist tools needed, Tracpipe sections can be installed up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, making installation easy with the hand-bending of sections.Features & Benefits: TracPipe Omegaflex CSST Installers Kit & TapeFast and fuss-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredReliable performance both internally and externallyAvailable in different sizes with a range of fittings availableBetter gas flow rates than other products so smaller diameter pipes can be used to save money and keep qualityNot annealed (softened) to maintain strength and resistance to damageTracpipe continues to excel in safety and quality, holding BSI kitemarks and compatibility for use in fire-protected areas. It has an up-to-date and comprehensive Design and Installation Specification, meeting the requirements of domestic and commercial/industrial installation standards for Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG). Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, the Tracpipe system remains a favourite amongst installers.Kit ContentsCut length Tracpipe2m sealing tapeStandards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked to BS 7838 and BS EN 15266Outer cover of TracPipe includes EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire rating of B-s1 d0Please note: Lengths are supplied and cut to size. Due to this, returns on lengths are not accepted.No fittings included.

Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, the Tracpipe system remains a favourite amongst installers.Kit ContentsCut length Tracpipe2m sealing tapeStandards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked to BS 7838 and BS EN 15266Outer cover of TracPipe includes EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire rating of B-s1 d0Please note: Lengths are supplied and cut to size. product.name: TracPipe AutoFlare Unequal Tee
product.description: Serving as a vital component in the TracPipe gas piping system, this TracPipe AutoFlare Unequal Tee enables the seamless connection of gas lines in various configurations. It is designed to allow the division of gas flow in uneven proportions, accommodating diverse installation requirements.By utilising this TracPipe AutoFlare Unequal Tee, gas line installers can effectively branch off a main gas line into two different directions, maintaining a consistent gas flow while catering to varying distribution needs.Features & Benefits: TracPipe AutoFlare Unequal TeeBrass constructionEnables gas line division in varying proportionsFacilitates branching of the main gas line into two different directionsEnsures controlled and efficient gas flow distribution within the systemProvides a secure, leak-resistant connection for uninterrupted gas flowOffers versatile and customised gas line configurations for specific layout needs

product.name: TracPipe AutoFlare Copper Compression 90 Degree Elbow
product.description: Enabling smooth direction changes and secure connections in your gas line layout, this TracPipe AutoFlare Copper Compression 90° Elbow plays a crucial role in the TracPipe gas piping system, connecting Brass AutoFlare to Copper Compression fittings.By utilising this TracPipe AutoFlare Copper Compression 90-Degree Elbow, you can effectively navigate around structural features or building components, maintaining a consistent gas supply while ensuring a secure and leak-free connection. Designed to facilitate a precise 90-degree turn in the gas pipe, it provides an efficient and streamlined flow of gas around corners or obstacles.Features & Benefits: TracPipe AutoFlare Copper Compression 90 Degree ElbowConnects Brass AutoFlare to Copper Compression fittings90° bend for smooth directional changesEnsures secure, leak-free connection for consistent gas supplyReliable performance with long-term durabilityOptimises gas pipe routing efficiencyAvailable in a range of diameters

product.name: Solvent Weld Soil Above Ground Plain Ended Soil Pipe - 3m
product.description: This durable plastic soil pipe from JTM is intended for solvent weld joint. Available in standard 3m long segments with a 110mm diameter, it’s fully compatible with most waste and underground drainage systems. It’s designed to a strict ‘EN-1566-1 Plastics Piping Systems for Soil and Waste Discharge (Low and High Temperature) Within the Building Structure’ standard, so you can be sure it meets all relevant regulations.  Easy and quick to install, this plain ended plastic soil pipe is available in olive grey and black. It goes with fittings designed to an ‘EN 1329-1 - Plastics Piping Systems for Soil and Waste Discharge (Low and High Temperature) Within the Building Structure’. All in all, it’s a sturdy solution that will convey any sewage safely and securely. Features & Benefits: Solvent Weld Soil Above Ground Plain Ended Soil Pipe - 3mHigh quality plastic soil pipe  3000mm x 110mm in size  Available in olive grey and black  Designed to EN-1566-1 standard  Solvent weld joint  Quick and easy to install
product.variant_name: Solvent Weld Soil Black Above Ground Plain Ended Soil Pipe - 3m

product.name: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit With Fittings & Tape
product.description: Offering a dynamic and adaptable alternative to conventional fixed copper piping, this TracPipe Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) Installers Kit has garnered significant popularity. This comprehensive kit caters to both interior and exterior applications, facilitating hassle-free male-to-male connection through its inclusive array of AutoFlare fittings and purpose-built sealing tape.Featuring an innovatively designed corrugated steel structure, the pipes effortlessly bend and flex without compromising their integrity. Enhanced with composite sheathing, they provide a dependable conduit for natural gas systems, ensuring remarkable flexibility and reliability. Notably, the TracPipe system boasts an installation speed of up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, presenting a compelling advantage for installers. The absence of soldering, welding or specialised tools streamlines the installation process, allowing for effortless manual manipulation of the sections.Features & Benefits: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit With Fittings & TapeIncludes TracPipe, two male AutoFlare adaptors and sealing tapeQuick and hassle-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredRobust, reliable performance both internally and externallyAvailable in sizes DN12 to DN32 with a comprehensive range of fittingsSuperior gas flow rates, so smaller diameter pipes can be used – saves money without losing qualityDoes not require any hot works or special tools to attach the AutoFlare® fittingsNot annealed (softened) – stronger and more resistant to damageFor Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) distribution2-hour (120 minutes) fire rating when installed in continuous lengths (no joints)With a strong emphasis on safety and quality, TracPipe proudly holds BSI Kitemarks and boasts leading B-S1 EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire ratings. Its availability in various lengths, standard diameter nominals and convenient pre-packed kits reflects its wide-ranging appeal and solidifies its status as a favoured choice. With the most up-to-date and comprehensive Design and Installation Specification, it fully reflects the requirements of both domestic and commercial/industrial installation standards for Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG).Standards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked and class-leading B-S1 Euroclass fire ratingsBSI Kitemarked to both BS 7838 and BS EN 15266
product.variant_name: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit  - 5m DN15, 2 Male 15mm x 1/2 inch Adaptors and small tape

product.description: The Solvent Weld Soil Single Socket Access Pipe is an essential component for above-ground soil and vent systems, designed to provide easy access for cleaning and maintenance. With a 110mm diameter, this access pipe is compatible with a variety of soil and vent configurations, offering a secure and reliable solution for managing waste flow. Available in Olive Grey and Black, it seamlessly blends with your existing system for a polished, professional look.This access pipe features a solvent weld connection for a secure, leak-free joint and long-lasting durability. product.name: Prorad Double Panel Single Convector Radiator Type 21 300mm High
product.description: ProRad radiators come with three designs. Designs include type 11 (K1), Type 21 (P+) and Type 22 (K2). Slimline single panel designs (Type 11) have slighter footprints and are great for small spaces. Larger units, however, are made with two panels and fins that offer higher heat outputs (BTU) and in turn increase the size.Type 21 ProRad radiators are made from a singe convector (row of fins), but has a second panel to enclose the convector. By using a single set of fins the radiator can be thinner, perfect for small spaces.Features & Benefits: Prorad Double Panel Single Convector Radiator Type 21 300mm HighMade from a single convector (row of fins)Feature a second panel to enclose the convectorSingle set of fins makes the radiator thinner for tight spacesSlighter footprints

product.name: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 500mm High
product.description: These ProRad radiators feature a decent range of designs: Type 11 (K1), Type 21 (P+) and Type 22 (K2). Slimline single panel designs (Type 11) work great in tight spaces and have smaller footprints. Larger units are bigger in size and have two panels and fins that offer higher heat outputs (BTU).Type 22 radiators include two convectors (rows of fins). By doubling the number of fins, the surface area of the radiator is increased and allows more heat to be produced. This increases the projection of the radiator. Type 22 radiators use both front and back panels to help retain the heat and allow for an improved distribution throughout the room.Features & Benefits: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 500mm HighTwo convectors (rows of fins)Increased surface area lets more heat be producedProjection of the radiator also increasedFront and back panels to help retain the heatImproved distribution throughout the room

Larger units are bigger in size and have two panels and fins that offer higher heat outputs (BTU).Type 22 radiators include two convectors (rows of fins). By doubling the number of fins, the surface area of the radiator is increased and allows more heat to be produced. This increases the projection of the radiator. Type 22 radiators use both front and back panels to help retain the heat and allow for an improved distribution throughout the room.Features & Benefits: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 500mm HighTwo convectors (rows of fins)Increased surface area lets more heat be producedProjection of the radiator also increasedFront and back panels to help retain the heatImproved distribution throughout the room

product.name: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 600mm High
product.description: These ProRad radiators feature a decent range of designs: Type 11 (K1), Type 21 (P+) and Type 22 (K2). Slimline single panel designs (Type 11) work great in tight spaces and have smaller footprints. Larger units are bigger in size and have two panels and fins that offer higher heat outputs (BTU).Type 22 radiators include two convectors (rows of fins). By doubling the number of fins, the surface area of the radiator is increased and allows more heat to be produced. This increases the projection of the radiator. Type 22 radiators use both front and back panels to help retain the heat and allow for an improved distribution throughout the room.Features & Benefits: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 600mm HighTwo convectors (rows of fins)Increased surface area lets more heat be producedProjection of the radiator also increasedFront and back panels to help retain the heatImproved distribution throughout the room

product.name: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 300mm High
product.description: These ProRad radiators feature a decent range of designs: Type 11 (K1), Type 21 (P+) and Type 22 (K2). Slimline single panel designs (Type 11) work great in tight spaces and have smaller footprints. Larger units are bigger in size and have two panels and fins that offer higher heat outputs (BTU).Type 22 radiators include two convectors (rows of fins). By doubling the number of fins, the surface area of the radiator is increased and allows more heat to be produced. This increases the projection of the radiator. Type 22 radiators use both front and back panels to help retain the heat and allow for an improved distribution throughout the room.Features & Benefits: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 300mm HighTwo convectors (rows of fins)Increased surface area lets more heat be producedProjection of the radiator also increasedFront and back panels to help retain the heatImproved distribution throughout the room

product.name: Prorad Double Convector Radiator Type 22 K2 400mm High
product.description: From ProRad, these Type 22 (K2) radiators come in a variety of widths to accommodate rooms of different dimensions, making them an excellent choice for heating almost any space. product.name: Prorad Single Convector Radiator Type 11 K1 300mm High
product.description: For spaces that require a heating solution with slim features, these Single Convector Radiator Type 11 (K1) radiators are ideal. ProRad provides a diverse range of radiator designs, including the Type 11 which encompasses a slimline profile and a single panel. In turn, it offers a reduced footprint and is particularly well-suited for confined areas.These radiators are constructed using a single convector and feature an open back facing the wall. The streamlined structure, with only the one set of fins, enables the radiator to be narrower so that you can heat even the tightest of spaces like behind sofas and other furnishings. These radiators can be purchased in an assortment of widths. Due to this flexibility, you are sure to find the right radiator for you so that you can keep your home warm no matter the weather.Features & Benefits: Prorad Single Convector Radiator Type 11 K1 300mm HighSlimline profile and a single panelWell-suited for confined areasSingle convector with an open back facing the wall

product.name: Rothenberger Water Pump Pliers
product.description: These Rothenberger Water Pump Pliers are made to conform to DIN 5231 D. They feature a heavy-duty box joint, chrome vanadium steel, drop forged and tempered polished head and joint. The plastic covered handles and the crush and pinch protection increase safety alongside the non-slip quality, even when used on smooth surfaces.These pliers are ideal for hard-to-reach places thanks to the longer, thinner pliers head with measurements that are favourable for corners. They also allow for optimum grip to get a reliable hold of pipes, flat objects, squared and hexagonal screws.Features & Benefits: Rothenberger Water Pump PliersSize optionsLong service life through induction hardened teeth7 size settingsSafe use with the crush and pinch protectionConform to DIN 5231 D

product.name: Rothenberger Guide for Multibender
product.description: The Rothenberger Guide for Multibender is an essential accessory for achieving precise, professional bends with your Multibender tool. Crafted from high-quality aluminium, this guide provides durability and smooth operation, ensuring accurate bends every time. Whether you're working with copper, stainless steel, or multilayer pipes, this guide enhances your bending efficiency and reduces the risk of kinks or misalignment, making it ideal for plumbing and heating professionals.Lightweight and easy to use, the Rothenberger Guide is designed to streamline your workflow, offering reliable performance on every job. Its robust aluminium construction ensures long-lasting durability, even under frequent use. If precision and consistency are priorities for your pipe bending tasks, this guide is the perfect companion to your Multibender.Features & Benefits: Rothenberger Guide for MultibenderDurable aluminium buildEnhances bending accuracySuitable for copper and stainless steel pipes

product.name: Arctic Spray Abrasive Roll
product.description: The Arctic Spray Abrasive Roll is the ideal tool for achieving smooth, clean surfaces before any plumbing, pipework, or general maintenance task. Designed for versatility and convenience, this abrasive roll effectively removes rust, dirt, and imperfections, ensuring surfaces are perfectly prepared for soldering, painting, or sealing. Its high-quality material provides consistent performance, helping you achieve professional-grade results with ease.With its flexible roll design, the Arctic Spray Abrasive Roll allows you to cut just the right amount for the task at hand, reducing waste and increasing efficiency. Its durable construction ensures it can handle tough cleaning and preparation jobs, making it suitable for a wide range of materials, including metal and pipe surfaces. Compact and easy to store, this roll is a go-to solution for all your preparation needs.Features & Benefits: Arctic Spray Abrasive RollEfficient surface preparationFlexible and convenientBuilt to handle tough jobs

product.name: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m Lengths
product.description: Climaflex is a flexible polyethylene foam based closed cell pipe insulation suitable for a broad range of water and heating applications, frost protection and impact protection. It can be glued, taped or simply pushed together to form an insulated pipe, making it a convenient, versatile option. Available in 1mtr segments and multiple pipe sizes, Climaflex pipe insulation combines high performance and low cost in most domestic applications, giving you the best of both worlds. While you can also use it externally, keep in mind that it will degrade faster in sunlight.What’s more, Climaflex pipe insulation is a sustainable, environmentally friendly solution that is completely CFC (chlorofluorocarbon) and HCFC (hydrochlorofluorocarbon) free and has an ODP (ozone depletion potential) of zero. It can accommodate temperatures ranging from -45 °C to +105 °C and has excellent thermal conductivity. Features & Benefits: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m LengthsHigh performance polyethylene-based closed-cell foam pipe insulation  Suitable for diverse heating and plumbing applications  Available in 1m segments and multiple pipe and thickness sizes  Thermal conductivity of 0.038 W/mK at 40°C, 0.036 W/mK at 20°C and 0.034 W/mK at 0°C  Environmentally friendly  Easy to fit
product.variant_name: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation - 15mm x 13mm x 1m Length

Available in 1mtr segments and multiple pipe sizes, Climaflex pipe insulation combines high performance and low cost in most domestic applications, giving you the best of both worlds. While you can also use it externally, keep in mind that it will degrade faster in sunlight.What’s more, Climaflex pipe insulation is a sustainable, environmentally friendly solution that is completely CFC (chlorofluorocarbon) and HCFC (hydrochlorofluorocarbon) free and has an ODP (ozone depletion potential) of zero. It can accommodate temperatures ranging from -45 °C to +105 °C and has excellent thermal conductivity. Features & Benefits: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 1m LengthsHigh performance polyethylene-based closed-cell foam pipe insulation  Suitable for diverse heating and plumbing applications  Available in 1m segments and multiple pipe and thickness sizes  Thermal conductivity of 0.038 W/mK at 40°C, 0.036 W/mK at 20°C and 0.034 W/mK at 0°C  Environmentally friendly  Easy to fit

product.description: These boxes of Climaflex pipe insulation are a practical, cost-effective way to stock up on this fantastic polyethylene-based foam system. product.name: Climaflex Polyethylene Pipe Insulation 2m Lengths
product.description: Climaflex is a foam (polyethylene) based closed cell pipe insulation suitable for water and heating applications. It is the same as Tubolit pipe insulation. product.name: McAlpine MacValve Self Closing Waste Valve
product.description: This MacValve self-closing waste valve can be fitted both horizontally and vertically. The MacValve membrane opens under water pressure to allow discharge to flow freely, then closes to form a tight seal that prevents foul odours or sewer gases from entering the building.  This MacValve can be fitted in many installations where a non-return is beneficial and can also be used to take the discharge from a pressure relief valve on an unvented domestic hot water storage system. When this MacValve is installed horizontally, the flow arrow must be in the uppermost position. This MacValve can be fitted in many installations where a non-return is beneficial and can also be used to take the discharge from a pressure relief valve on an unvented domestic hot water storage system. When this MacValve is installed horizontally, the flow arrow must be in the uppermost position. Features & Benefits: McAlpine MacValve Self Closing Waste ValveMembrane remains sealedFor installations where a non-return is beneficialFits horizontally or verticallyNo water seal to prevent dry out through evaporation or lack of useSize options available Please note: This MacValve self-closing waste valve is not recommended for use with shower trays unless there is access for maintenance.

product.name: Ideal Logic Combi2 Boiler

product.name: Ideal Vogue Max Combi Boiler with Ideal System Filter
product.description: The Ideal Vogue Max Combi Boiler with Ideal System Filter combines premium performance and built-in protection in one package. It's a wall-hung condensing boiler delivering both central heating and domestic hot water. Its composite outer casing conceals a stainless-steel heat exchanger, and thanks to the inclusion of a system filter, this boiler helps safeguard against debris and sludge, a key factor in maximising lifespan and reliability.For installers, the Vogue Max is designed to save time and reduce issues. It boasts a low lift weight, pre-wired mains lead, and push-fit flue collar, simplifying on-site installation. product.description: Compact yet capable, the Ideal Atlantic Combi Boiler with Standard Horizontal Flue delivers both central heating and domestic hot water in one unit. product.name: Samsung EHS Mono R290 3Phase Air-to-Water Outdoor Heat Pump
product.description: The Samsung EHS Mono R290 3-Phase A2W Outdoor Heat Pump is an ultra-efficient, low-carbon heating solution engineered for both residential and commercial properties. product.name: Clivet Edge F R290 3Phase Monobloc Heat Pump
product.description: The Clivet Edge F R290 3-Phase Monobloc Heat Pump is a sustainable, high-efficiency air-to-water system designed for larger homes and demanding residential applications. With its quiet operation and robust 3-phase power, it offers reliable, year-round comfort.Designed for modern energy-smart homes, the system supports app-based control, solar and photovoltaic integration, and smart-grid readiness. product.name: Clivet Edge EVO 2.0-EXC Monobloc 1Phase Heat Pump
product.description: The Clivet Edge EVO 2.0-EXC 1-Phase Monobloc Heat Pump is a compact, all-in-one air-to-water system ideal for small homes seeking efficient heating, cooling and domestic hot water. With a single-phase operation, it suits typical residential electrical supplies while offering strong performance in demanding conditions. Despite its small footprint, it operates reliably down to -25 °C and can deliver hot water up to 65 °C.As a monobloc unit, all components are housed outdoors, simplifying installation and removing the need for indoor refrigeration equipment. The system also supports smart control through the MSmartLife App or Modbus integration, enabling remote monitoring and flexible management. Its efficient inverter technology helps reduce running costs while maintaining stable temperatures throughout the home.Features & Benefits: Clivet Edge EVO 2.0-EXC Monobloc 1Phase Heat PumpSingle-phase monobloc for compact installationsOperates to -25 °C and supplies up to 65 °C waterSmart control via MSmartLife App or Modbus

product.name: Clivet Edge F R290 1Phase Monobloc Heat Pump
product.description: The Clivet Edge F R290 1-Phase Monobloc Heat Pump is a compact, high-efficiency air-to-water system providing heating in winter and cooling in summer from a single unit. Using ultra-low-GWP R290 refrigerant, it delivers sustainable performance with zero CO2 emissions at the point of use, producing more heat with less energy consumed. Suitable for renovations and modern homes alike, it works efficiently even with radiator systems thanks to supply temperatures up to 75°C, and operates reliably down to -25°C. Its quiet design, from 40 dB(A), makes it ideal for residential settings.Featuring built-in Wi-Fi smart control, the unit integrates easily with solar thermodynamic systems and includes an energy meter for tracking energy produced and absorbed over time.Features & Benefits: Clivet Edge F R290 1Phase Monobloc Heat PumpHeating & cooling in one R290 high-efficiency monoblocWorks with radiators up to 75°C water temperatureUp to six units can be combined in a cascade arrangement
